_comment: Topic paths that MUST be verbatim: byte-copied public-domain doctrine (prayers, the Baltimore Catechism, Scripture, creeds), NEVER AI-adapted. The provenance guard fails if a listed topic is authored as `adapted`. A `*` matches within one path segment (e.g. faith/catechism-*). This registry is the SECOND check; the primary structural gate is that every faith/** topic must have a provenance.json (see scripts/content/lib/verify.mjs). Keep this list complete as doctrine is added — but note that a mislabeled prayer at an unlisted slug is still caught only if you keep it current, whereas the mandatory-faith-provenance rule always applies.
